name: Pig Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour liquid from the can of Mandarin oranges into a small bowl.
2. Add the cake mix, butter, and vanilla to the bowl with the orange liquid.
3. Add eggs one at a time to the mixture.
4. Chop the Mandarin oranges into small pieces.
5. Beat all ingredients except for the chopped oranges together in the mixer for 3 minutes.
6. Add the chopped oranges and beat for an additional minute.
7. Pour the batter into three greased and floured foil cake pans.
8. For the frosting: Combine vanilla pudding mix with cream cheese and pineapple juice in a bowl.
9. Add powdered sugar and crushed pineapple pieces to the mixture. Fold in Dream Whip.
10. Beat the frosting for 2 minutes.
11. Frost the cake.
